title: Token scopes never enforced
description: AuthenticatedAccount stores scopes from oauth_tokens but no endpoint checks auth.scopes before acting. A read-only token (scope='read') can call POST /api/v1/statuses, DELETE /api/v1/statuses/:id, POST /api/v1/accounts/:id/follow, etc. Any token grants full read+write+follow+push regardless of granted scope.
